snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client._.foo()
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client._.foo()


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.folder_service.folder_service_unknown_request(
    request={"key": "value"},
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.folder_service.folder_service_unknown_request(
        request={"key": "value"},
    )


asyncio.run(main())
